channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Amid Ukraine’s daring assaults, Russia scales back Victory Day celebrations - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Amid Ukraine’s daring assaults, Russia scales back Victory Day celebrations  Al Jazeera
  2. A Less Muscular Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability  The New York Times
  3. Putin says Russia fighting for "just cause" in Ukraine during scaled-down Victory Day parade under tight security  CBS News
  4. Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different  BBC
  5. Putin Presides Over Downsized Military Parade as Ukraine War Drags On  WSJ

item.title: Péter Magyar sworn in as Hungary’s prime minister to end 16-year Orbán era - The Guardian

item.title: Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation - AP News
item.description:
1. Venice Biennale opens without a jury amid strife over Russian and Israeli participation  AP News

item.title: Rubio charms in Rome, but he says Trump’s verbal attacks may continue - The Washington Post
item.description:
